headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Henry Schein’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Henry Schein’s first quarter results were well received by the market, with outperformance driven by robust gains in U.S. dental and global technology segments. CEO Frederick Lowery pointed to ongoing market share gains and stable dental procedure volumes as key contributors, while highlighting that merchandise price increases and continued investments from dental service organizations (DSOs) underpinned growth. The medical business was impacted by a lighter flu season, which weighed on demand f
